name: Julie Hickman
body: LeeI love that song also. I completely get your heart. Bring it on!! I love how you see God in everything. We thank you for your transparency in your writing. Keep sharing. It helps all of us Aunt Julie

name: Ashley Foster Okel
body: See, I told you your village would flood in ❤️❤️❤️ You leveled up though! Loving you all through the rollercoaster 💕 Keep walking forward 💕

name: Patty Klopfenstein
body: Lyla we are so glad you are doing well. We continue to pray for you and your family. All our Love Uncle Dan and Aunt Patty

name: Ashley Phillips
body: What a beautiful testimony to God's care, provision, and abundant love. Great writing, even better story. ♥ Love you all! So thankful you all are okay. More than okay. ♥
